fields.name: Bedding
fields.description: Transform your bedroom into a sanctuary with our luxurious bedding collection. From silky smooth duvet covers to plush pillows, each piece is crafted from the finest materials for an unparalleled sleep experience.

fields.name: Bath
fields.description: Elevate your bathing ritual with our premium bath linens. Turkish cotton towels, organic bathrobes, and spa-quality accessories bring hotel luxury to your home.

fields.name: Curtains
fields.description: Frame your windows with elegance. Our curtain collection features light-filtering linens, opulent velvets, and thermal-insulating options in timeless designs.

fields.name: Carpets
fields.description: Ground your space in luxury with our handcrafted carpets and rugs. From Persian-inspired designs to contemporary minimalist pieces, each rug tells a story of artisan craftsmanship.

fields.name: Accents
fields.description: Complete your home with our curated selection of decorative accents. Cashmere throws, silk cushions, and artisanal table linens add the finishing touch to any room.

fields.name: Silk Duvet Cover Set
fields.description: Indulge in the ultimate luxury with our 100% mulberry silk duvet cover. Temperature-regulating and hypoallergenic, this set includes a duvet cover and two pillowcases in lustrous charmeuse weave.

fields.name: Egyptian Cotton Sheet Set
fields.description: Experience the legendary softness of genuine Egyptian cotton. Our 1000-thread-count sateen sheets feature a subtle sheen and get softer with every wash. Set includes flat sheet, fitted sheet, and pillowcases.

fields.name: Linen Duvet Cover
fields.description: Stonewashed Belgian linen in a relaxed, lived-in style. Breathable and temperature-regulating, perfect for year-round comfort. Features mother-of-pearl button closure.

fields.name: Down Alternative Pillow
fields.description: Plush hypoallergenic pillow with premium microfiber fill. Medium support perfect for all sleep positions. Features 400-thread-count cotton cover.

fields.name: Turkish Cotton Towel Set
fields.description: Woven from premium Aegean cotton with a 700 GSM weight for exceptional absorbency. Set includes 2 bath towels, 2 hand towels, and 2 washcloths.

fields.name: Waffle Weave Bathrobe
fields.description: Lightweight waffle weave robe in organic cotton. Spa-inspired design with shawl collar, patch pockets, and matching belt. Quick-drying and travel-friendly.

fields.name: Bamboo Bath Mat
fields.description: Eco-friendly bamboo bath mat with antimicrobial properties. Features non-slip rubber backing and elegant slatted design. Water-resistant and easy to clean.

fields.name: Linen Curtain Panels
fields.description: Pure French linen curtains with soft light-filtering properties. Each panel features a rod pocket top and weighted hem for beautiful draping. Sold as a pair.

fields.name: Velvet Blackout Curtains
fields.description: Sumptuous cotton velvet curtains with complete blackout lining. Perfect for bedrooms and media rooms. Features triple-fold pinch pleat heading. Sold as a pair.

fields.name: Sheer Voile Panels
fields.description: Delicate polyester voile panels that filter light while maintaining privacy. Machine washable with wrinkle-resistant finish. Set of 2 panels.

fields.name: Hand-Knotted Persian Rug
fields.description: Authentic hand-knotted wool rug featuring traditional Persian medallion design. Each piece takes artisans months to complete. Size: 8' x 10'.

fields.name: Moroccan Berber Rug
fields.description: Handwoven by Berber artisans using traditional techniques. Plush wool pile with iconic diamond pattern. Size: 5' x 8'.

fields.name: Jute Natural Rug
fields.description: Sustainably harvested jute fibers in a casual braided design. Perfect for coastal or bohemian interiors. Size: 6' x 9'.

fields.name: Cashmere Throw Blanket
fields.description: Ultra-soft 100% Mongolian cashmere throw with hand-tied fringe. Lightweight yet incredibly warm. Size: 50" x 60".

fields.name: Silk Decorative Pillows
fields.description: Set of 2 silk dupioni throw pillows with invisible zipper closure. Features feather-down insert for luxurious plumpness. Size: 20" x 20".

fields.name: Linen Table Runner
fields.description: Elegant stonewashed linen table runner with mitered corners. Perfect for everyday dining or special occasions. Size: 16" x 90".
